entries.claim: Identity key persists across reloads via localStorage
entries.method: loadOrCreateIdentity called twice with same prefix; both keypairs match

entries.claim: Each storagePrefix produces a distinct keypair (no cross-app reuse)
entries.method: loadOrCreateIdentity with two different prefixes; private keys differ

entries.claim: A claims moderator → B's hook reports A as current moderator
entries.method: linkMockRooms relays Y.Doc updates; A.claim() then read on B

entries.claim: A signed claim with expiresAt in the past is treated as vacant
entries.method: Plant claim with expiresAt = now - 60s; hook reports current=null

entries.claim: A claim with a signature not matching its embedded pubkey is treated as vacant
entries.method: Plant {pubkey:real, sig:forger}; hook rejects and reports current=null

entries.claim: Relinquish by the current moderator clears the slot for all peers
entries.method: After A.relinquish() both A and B observe current=null

entries.claim: The moderator claim's signature verifies against the embedded pubkey
Fresh room reports no moderator and isMe=false
entries.method: useModerator hook on a fresh mock room returns {current:null, isMe:false}

entries.claim: Invalid signature / pubkey inputs return false instead of crashing
A signed payload with any byte modified fails verification
A's signature does not verify under B's public key
entries.method: Sign with kpA.priv, verify with kpB.pub returns false

entries.claim: A signed payload verifies against the matching pubkey
entries.method: Ed25519 sign(payload, privkey) then verify(payload, sig, pubkey)

entries.claim: trustFingerprint emits a 4x2-hex grouped string for in-person verification
peerIdFromPubkey is deterministic and uses 64-bit prefix of pubkey
entries.method: Two calls with same pubkey return the same 16-hex-char id

entries.claim: register() writes a self-signed PubkeyRecord into the registry Y.Map
entries.method: Verify the stored record's signature against its own pubkey

entries.claim: A forged record signed by the wrong key does not block the real peer from publishing
entries.method: Pre-write mallory-signed alice claim; alice arrives and overwrites with her own
